causal_rule.associative_only: on-target knockdown in at least one Marson condition but 10 or fewer DE genes in the strongest condition, with no explicit causal driver claim
causal_rule.claim_under_test: Which genes in the associative Claude Science response signature behave as causal regulators of the CD4+ activation program?
causal_rule.condition_rule: strongest on-target effect across Rest, Stim8hr, and Stim48hr
causal_rule.contradicted: an explicit causal or driver claim exists, and on-target knockdown moves 10 or fewer genes in the strongest condition
causal_rule.evidence_attached: on-target knockdown in any Marson condition and more than 10 DE genes in the strongest condition
causal_rule.not_assayed: absent from the Marson table or no on-target knockdown in any Marson condition

claim_under_test: Which genes in the associative Claude Science response signature behave as causal regulators of the CD4+ activation program?

claude_science.session_caveat: The source report states that the AUCs are associative, sample size is modest, and signatures need independent validation before translational claims.

prospect.ceiling: Computation over released data, not wet-lab or clinical truth.
prospect.interpretation: Prospect separates candidate causal drivers from associative passengers. It does not say the response signature is wrong.
prospect.trust_path: frozen Marson lookup plus human key

receipt.claim: Which genes in the associative Claude Science response signature behave as causal regulators of the CD4+ activation program?

evidence.fact: signature genes typed as candidate drivers
